title: SCADA — Operasyonel Genel Bakış (TimescaleDB)
description: TimescaleDB SQL sorguları: tag sayısı, okuma hacmi, veri tazeliği, CAGG trend örneği.

panels.title: Toplam Tag Sayısı
panels.description: Sistemde kayıtlı toplam tag adedi (tags tablosu).

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Tag Sayısı" FROM tags

panels.title: Son Veri Tazeliği
panels.description: tag_readings tablosundaki en son timestamp değeri — veri aktarımının güncelliği.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM max(timestamp)) * 1000 AS "Son Okuma (ms)" FROM tag_readings
SELECT count(*) AS "İyi Kalite Okumalar" FROM tag_readings WHERE quality = 192 AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Saatlik Okuma Hacmi (tag_readings_1h CAGG)
panels.description: tag_readings_1h CAGG'inden saatlik okuma hacmi. Her saatin toplam satır sayısı.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  bucket AS time,
  SUM(n) AS "Okuma Sayısı"
FROM tag_readings_1h
WHERE bucket >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  AND bucket < $__timeTo()::timestamptz
GROUP BY bucket
ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: 5 Dakikalık Trend — İlk 5 Tag (tag_readings_5m CAGG)
panels.description: tag_readings_5m CAGG'inden ilk 5 tag için ortalama değer trendi.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  r.bucket AS time,
  t.name AS metric,
  r.avg AS value
FROM tag_readings_5m r
INNER JOIN tags t ON t.id = r.tag_id
WHERE r.bucket >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  AND r.bucket < $__timeTo()::timestamptz
  AND r.tag_id IN (SELECT id FROM tags ORDER BY id LIMIT 5)
ORDER BY r.bucket, t.name

panels.title: BAD Kalite Oranı — Saatlik (tag_readings_1h CAGG)
panels.description: BAD-quality ratio computed from raw tag_readings where quality <> 192. Aggregated per hour via time_bucket.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS time,
  CASE WHEN count(*) > 0
       THEN count(*) FILTER (WHERE quality <> 192)::float / count(*)
       ELSE 0 END AS "BAD Oran"
FROM tag_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
